name: typescript-node-dev
postCreateCommand: curl -fsSL https://mise.run | sh && echo 'eval "$(~/.local/bin/mise activate bash)"' >> ~/.bashrc && MISE_CONFIG_FILE=.devcontainer/mise.toml ~/.local/bin/mise install && MISE_CONFIG_FILE=.devcontainer/mise.toml ~/.local/bin/mise exec -- sh -lc 'npm config set prefix "$HOME/.npm-global" && npm install -g typescript ts-node @anthropic-ai/claude-code @openai/codex' && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git-delta zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting
